reviews.originalComment: Cocok buat kaum2 tidak suka keramaian. Dan pastinya makanannya enak bangetttt. Walaupun jauh dri kota dijamin gk bakalan lapar krn cafenya menyediakan makanan yang enakkk 🫶🏻🫶🏻
reviews.reviewComments: Perfect for those who don't like crowds. And of course, the food is really delicious. Even though it's far from the city, you're guaranteed not to go hungry because the cafe offers really good food 🫶🏻🫶🏻

Tenang, nyaman, damai.. anak2 bisa bermain di pantai dengan puas. untuk yg cari ketenangan sangat rekomen disini. ky tinggal di runah sendiri yg terhampar kebun yg bnyk daunnya  dan pinggir pantai. Ownernya baik, di carikan dolpin trip dengan harga yg relatif terjangkau.. tambahan dikasih bonus nasi goreng untuk anak2.. terimakasih, pengalaman yg menyenangkan saat di sabang.
Saya senang dengan keramahan dan pelayanan di Rihlah Resort. Pantai depan kamar menawarkan view yang diluar ekspektasi saya karena harga yang ditawarkan relatif murah ketika peak season.

reviews.originalComment: Sebenernya masih kurang banget cuma sehari di rihlah
reviews.reviewComments: Actually, one day of vacation is still not enough.

The location is perfectly situated at the beach for a relaxing get away on a sleepy island. The owner, sutria, is very nice and speaks good English. The staff, especially Sutria, create a family like atmosphere by cooking together (with the guests) or just chatting while watching the sea.
Amazing resort!

Thank you for the service
Awesome

reviews.reviewTitle: Amazing place, amazing view, amazing service
reviews.reviewComments:
I was here for 4 nights and enjoyed every single night. 

The location is slightly far from the hustle and bustle of Iboih Beach but that made for a very quiet and private place. We practically had the entire beach to ourselves. 

The room was comfortable, with clean bathrooms. There is even a mini restaurant/cafe on the premises and the Ayam Tangkap (a specialty Aceh dish is highly recommended). They are also able to provide breakfast from outside vendors to be delivered to your room in the morning. 

Service was top notch. Satrya, the owner was able to arrange everything for us, including airport transfers, tours around the island as well as dolphin tours that picked us up right on the beach infront of our room. 

Highly recommended and will come back again.

So far we have been staying over 5 places in sabang and this place beats every other our stays even the far pricier one, friendly owner and staff, very quiet side, not exactly at the heart of Iboih where are more things to do but its just 10mins away with bike, room is basic but works well, the only suggestion we give is better pillows type and more hooks in room to hang our stuff, other than that i hope they stay true and keep the authenticity
Pemilik dan staff terbaik dgn pelayan yang ramah

reviews.originalComment:
I advise you as your brother friend. Such actions do not want to reserving the resort as a guest. I think you need to know how important "beautiful last" is.
----------------------------------------

Saya menyarankan Anda sebagai teman saudara Anda. Tindakan seperti itu tidak ingin melanjutkan resor sebagai tamu. Saya pikir Anda perlu tahu betapa pentingnya "terang yang indah".
reviews.reviewComments: I advise you as your brother's friend. Such actions do not want to continue the resort as a guest. I think you need to know how important "beautiful light" is.

Permata tersembunyi di Iboih, fasilitas kamar terbaik dan kebersihan kamar, bed sheet terjaga baik dan kasur yang nyaman. 
5 star service with super friendly owner that work with heart.
Keep this good work Rihlah

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya super nyaman, pelayanannya luar biasa, makanannya enak banget.. Anak bisa bermain dengan puas di pantainya.. Pemandangan ya MasyaAllah indah sekali..
reviews.reviewComments: The place is super comfortable, the service is extraordinary, the food is really delicious.. The kids can play happily on the beach.. The view is, MasyaAllah, very beautiful..
Super endroit pour être au calme et profiter d'une jolie plage et d'un beau spot de snorkeling. Ambiance décontractée et service adorable de la part de notre hôte. Un endroit où on a envie de revenir

reviews.reviewTitle: Best place to be in Pulau Weh
reviews.reviewComments: Such a nice experience! Best beach for snorkeling, very friendly and helpful owner. Best cook, so delicious! We really enjoyed our time at Rihlah and can absolutely recommend it! Unforgettable time!

Sehr empfehlenswert.
Einer der schönstens Strände auf der Insel

reviews.reviewTitle: Really nice place to relax and enjoy the Beach
reviews.reviewComments:
When we stayed at Rilah Resort it was really quite which we really enjoyed. The staff was super nice and helpful. The view is really nice and the beach right in front of the accommodation is tidy. For everybody who wants to relax it’s the right place. The owner was really helpful and super kind. The rooms were clean and spacious. 
Thanks for the stay.

Stay only one night
Very very peaceful,relax ,enjoy our stay
We stay at sea view bungalow,
Best stay ever,value for yourmoney

The view is mesmerizing! 

I very love the view here. Love the location of the hotel facing the beach view. Love the privacy of the room facing the beach at night. I would like to say the owner and staff are so kind, friendly and helpful. 

This area is really recommended for snorkeling and dolphin tours. Here is the place to chill and relax and enjoy the mesmerizing view, especially during sunrise and sunset! The food is delicious and awesome. Breakfast/Dinner is good!  

We enjoy our staying here. The place to head to at Sabang. Perfect sea view (gorgeous color), sunrise views, and sounds of waves hitting the sand from the room, perfect!

Nice view, a nice place, and good food as well. Sleeping with the rhythm of waves is surely unforgettable. I will come back for sure.
